powershell_commands.name: Get-Command
powershell_commands.description: Lists all available cmdlets, functions, workflows, aliases, and scripts.

powershell_commands.name: Get-Help
powershell_commands.description: Displays detailed help information for a specified cmdlet or concept.

powershell_commands.name: Update-Help
powershell_commands.description: Downloads and installs the latest help files for installed modules.

powershell_commands.name: Get-Service
powershell_commands.description: Retrieves the status of services on a local or remote machine.

powershell_commands.name: Start-Service
powershell_commands.description: Starts a specified service.

powershell_commands.name: Stop-Service
powershell_commands.description: Stops a specified service.

powershell_commands.name: Restart-Service
powershell_commands.description: Restarts a specified service.

powershell_commands.name: Get-Process
powershell_commands.description: Lists all currently running processes.

powershell_commands.name: Stop-Process
powershell_commands.description: Terminates a process by its name or process ID.

powershell_commands.name: Start-Process
powershell_commands.description: Launches a new process or application.

powershell_commands.name: Get-EventLog
powershell_commands.description: Retrieves recent entries from a specified event log.

powershell_commands.name: Clear-Host
powershell_commands.description: Clears the PowerShell console screen.

powershell_commands.name: Set-ExecutionPolicy
powershell_commands.description: Configures the script execution policy.

powershell_commands.name: Get-Item
powershell_commands.description: Retrieves a specified file or directory object.

powershell_commands.name: Set-Item
powershell_commands.description: Modifies the value or property of a file or directory.

powershell_commands.name: New-Item
powershell_commands.description: Creates a new file, folder, or other item at the specified location.

powershell_commands.name: Copy-Item
powershell_commands.description: Copies an item from one location to another.

powershell_commands.name: Move-Item
powershell_commands.description: Moves or renames a file or folder.

powershell_commands.name: Remove-Item
powershell_commands.description: Deletes a file or folder permanently.

powershell_commands.name: Get-ChildItem
powershell_commands.description: Lists the contents of a directory.

powershell_commands.name: Set-Location
powershell_commands.description: Changes the current working directory.

powershell_commands.name: Get-Location
powershell_commands.description: Displays the current directory.

powershell_commands.name: Out-File
powershell_commands.description: Redirects command output to a file.

powershell_commands.name: Export-Csv
powershell_commands.description: Exports objects to a CSV file.

powershell_commands.name: Import-Csv
powershell_commands.description: Imports data from a CSV file as objects.

powershell_commands.name: ConvertTo-Json
powershell_commands.description: Converts PowerShell objects into a JSON-formatted string.

powershell_commands.name: ConvertFrom-Json
powershell_commands.description: Converts JSON text into PowerShell objects.

powershell_commands.name: Get-Content
powershell_commands.description: Reads the contents of a file.

powershell_commands.name: Set-Content
powershell_commands.description: Writes or replaces content in a file.

powershell_commands.name: Add-Content
powershell_commands.description: Appends additional content to a file.

powershell_commands.name: Select-Object
powershell_commands.description: Selects specific properties from an object or collection of objects.

powershell_commands.name: Where-Object
powershell_commands.description: Filters objects based on a condition.

powershell_commands.name: Sort-Object
powershell_commands.description: Sorts objects by a property.

powershell_commands.name: Measure-Object
powershell_commands.description: Calculates statistics for numeric properties of objects.

powershell_commands.name: ForEach-Object
powershell_commands.description: Executes a script block for each object in a collection.

powershell_commands.name: Group-Object
powershell_commands.description: Groups objects that share a common property value.

powershell_commands.name: Compare-Object
powershell_commands.description: Compares two sets of objects and shows differences.

powershell_commands.name: Get-Date
powershell_commands.description: Retrieves the current system date and time.

powershell_commands.name: Start-Sleep
powershell_commands.description: Pauses script execution for a specified number of seconds.

powershell_commands.name: Test-Connection
powershell_commands.description: Tests network connectivity similar to the ping command.

powershell_commands.name: Resolve-DnsName
powershell_commands.description: Performs a DNS query for the specified name.

powershell_commands.name: Get-WmiObject
powershell_commands.description: Retrieves data from Windows Management Instrumentation.

powershell_commands.name: Get-CimInstance
powershell_commands.description: Retrieves CIM objects.

powershell_commands.name: Invoke-CimMethod
powershell_commands.description: Invokes a method on a CIM instance.

powershell_commands.name: Get-Module
powershell_commands.description: Lists all modules currently imported into your session.

powershell_commands.name: Import-Module
powershell_commands.description: Loads a specified module into the session.

powershell_commands.name: Remove-Module
powershell_commands.description: Unloads a module from your session.
